title: Copy groups to New Board and remain connected?
excerpt: I have a Board that contain various groups that will be managed by different departments. At the moment the board is HUGE [No. Rows] and I am creating various views for each department. I think it would help to move grou…

posts.author: ALPSPT (RL)
posts.cookedHtml: I have a Board that contain various groups that will be managed by different departments. At the moment the board is HUGE [No. Rows] and I am creating various views for each department. I think it would help to move groups into its own sub board. What is the best approach? I don’t really want to export and upload as I want the data to be linked i.e. if the sub board is updated/items created the main board will be updated also? (any help is much appreciated)

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: There’s an app called ‘Same Item Multiple Boards’ that you might want to look at. Once you install, you can create an automation to ‘make’ that same item on your ‘sub board’. Then any changes you make on either board will reflect on the other.
